message:
fix: resolve CI failures and bump version to 0.3.18

Fix the long-standing CI breakage caused by Cargo resolving optional
ftui path deps (/dp/frankentui/) which don't exist in GitHub Actions.
Add a sed step to all CI and release workflow jobs that strips the
local-only TUI path deps before any cargo command. Also fix 158+
nightly clippy lints (map_unwrap_or, duration_suboptimal_units,
sort_by_key, items_after_statements, redundant_clone, etc.) that
accumulated from nightly toolchain drift.

Test gate: 905 lib + 35 bin = 940 tests passing, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,11 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Strip local-only TUI path deps
+        run: |
+          # ftui crates use /dp/frankentui/ paths unavailable in CI; strip them
+          sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
@@ -36,6 +41,10 @@ jobs:
     needs: check
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Strip local-only TUI path deps
+        run: |
+          sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run unit tests
@@ -58,6 +67,10 @@ jobs:

       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run integration tests
